title: DescribeGameSessionQueuesInput
description: DescribeGameSessionQueuesInput schema from Amazon GameLift API

allOf.description: A list of queue names to retrieve information for. You can use either the queue ID or ARN value. To request settings for all queues, leave this parameter empty.
The maximum number of results to return. Use this parameter with NextToken to get results as a set of sequential pages. You can request up to 50 results.

A token that indicates the start of the next sequential page of results. Use the token that is returned with a previous call to this operation. To start at the beginning of the result set, do not specify a value.
